notes: focusTargetId is battle-only and is not persisted into StandingOrderTemplate
resolveTick uses the focus target only while it remains alive, spotted, in range, and in the formation fire arc
mobile QA happened after battle status reached collapse, but the focus-target UI path and DOM updates were still verified with live spotted enemy groups
